ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with all fields legible. Certificate number SEG-26D-452107, marked ORIGINAL (1/1). Issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Single page commercial invoice with CAMAB branding. All fields legible.

document_classification.classification_notes: Document A page 1 is the Certificate of Origin. Document A page 2 is a copy of the invoice embedded in the certificate file — per rule 8.5.0, this embedded copy is NOT used for verification. Document B page 1 is the separate invoice file used for verification. Both documents are text-based and fully legible.

lc_check.lc_validation_steps: Searched certificate for LC/L/C/Letter of Credit/Documentary Credit references. The remarks field contains 'SBI 251020' which is an order number, not an LC reference. No LC-related field labels or bank terms found anywhere in the certificate.

search_results.context: Seller address block: Campanello & Co AB, Kungsporten 4a, SE-427 50 Billdal, Sweden
Footer block with VAT-no and banking details

consignor_search_step_2b.conclusion: Consignor name 'Campanello & Co AB' found in invoice SELLER field and footer. Direct match confirmed.

criteria_met.detail: Certificate consignor 'Campanello & Co AB' matches invoice SELLER 'Campanello & Co AB' exactly.
Certificate consignee 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' matches invoice BUYER 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' exactly.

pairing_validation.notes: Certificate does not contain an explicit invoice number reference. However, both consignor and consignee match. Order number SBI 251020 in certificate remarks matches ORDER NO. in invoice. Pairing is valid.

candidates.raw_text: Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.
candidates.normalized_text: mohammed a ali bin mahfouz trading est.

candidates.normalized_text: 6276 khalid lbn al-waleed ash sharafiyah district, jeddah, kingdom of saudi arabia

candidates.raw_text: Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.
candidates.normalized_text: mohammed a ali bin mahfouz trading est.

candidates.raw_text: 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash, Sharafiyah District, Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
candidates.normalized_text: 6276 khalid lbn al-waleed ash, sharafiyah district, jeddah, kingdom of saudi arabia

candidates.source_location: DESCRIPTION OF GOODS column, line item, page 1

consignor.certificate_value: Campanello & Co AB, Kungsporten 4a, SE-427 50, Billdal, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Campanello & Co AB, Kungsporten 4a, SE-427 50 Billdal, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.result: Consignor 'Campanello & Co AB' found directly as SELLER in invoice. Direct match — no need for group structure rule.
Certificate: 'Campanello & Co AB' → normalized: 'campanello & co ab'. Invoice SELLER: 'Campanello & Co AB' → normalized: 'campanello & co ab'. Exact match.
Certificate country: 'Sweden'. Invoice SELLER address: 'Sweden'. Additionally confirmed by VAT-no prefix 'SE' (SE556681386001) and IBAN prefix 'SE'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Group structure — consignor name searched in all invoice files
Legal party — exact name match after normalization

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'Campanello & Co AB' at Kungsporten 4a, SE-427 50 Billdal, Sweden matches invoice SELLER 'Campanello & Co AB' at Kungsporten 4a, SE-427 50 Billdal, Sweden. Company name is identical after normalization. Country is Sweden in both documents, additionally confirmed by VAT prefix SE and IBAN prefix SE. Result: MATCH per 4.1.3.1 and 4.1.4.

consignee.certificate_value: Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est. 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash Sharafiyah District, Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est. 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash, Sharafiyah District, Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has BUYER field: 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' — this is the authoritative consignee per priority 1.

Certificate: 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' → normalized: 'mohammed a ali bin mahfouz trading est.' Invoice BUYER: 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' → normalized: 'mohammed a ali bin mahfouz trading est.' Exact match.
Certificate: 'Kingdom of Saudi Arabia'. Invoice BUYER address: 'Kingdom of Saudi Arabia'. Exact match.

rules_applied.description: Priority identification — BUYER field is primary billing field
Name verification — exact match after normalization
Country check — Kingdom of Saudi Arabia matches

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' with address 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash Sharafiyah District, Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia matches invoice BUYER 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' with address 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash, Sharafiyah District, Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. Name is identical. Country is Kingdom of Saudi Arabia in both. Minor comma/formatting difference in address does not constitute a mismatch per 4.2.4. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.result: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers. Priority 1 not applicable.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and search in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate goods description: 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'WHITEWOOD'. The prefix 'SWEDISH' is a geographical adjective corresponding to the certificate's country of origin (Sweden) — per rule 4.3.4, this is a non-identity-bearing addition. Invoice DESCRIPTION field (header): 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD' — exact match of full text. Invoice DESCRIPTION OF GOODS (line item): 'WHITEWOOD' — exact match of identity-bearing main designation.

comparison_steps.description: Check whether '25 PACKAGES' and 'SWEDISH' prefix affect identity
comparison_steps.result: '25 PACKAGES' is a packaging indication (number and kind of packages as per box 6 format). 'SWEDISH' is a geographical adjective corresponding to origin country Sweden per 4.3.4. Neither changes product identity. The identity-bearing main designation 'WHITEWOOD' is present in both documents.
comparison_steps.conclusion: Additions do not affect identity — MATCH

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation 'WHITEWOOD' identified in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions — 'SWEDISH' is geographical prefix matching origin country, '25 PACKAGES' is packaging info
rules_applied.outcome: Additions permitted, do not affect identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as '25 PACKAGES SWEDISH WHITEWOOD / SWEDISH WHITEWOOD'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'WHITEWOOD'. Invoice header DESCRIPTION field states 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD' and the line item DESCRIPTION OF GOODS states 'WHITEWOOD'. Both match. 'SWEDISH' is a geographical adjective corresponding to the certificate's origin country (Sweden) and is permitted per 4.3.4. '25 PACKAGES' is packaging information in box 6 and not identity-bearing. Result: MATCH per 4.3.3 and 4.3.4.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate says 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD' but invoice line item says only 'WHITEWOOD'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.3.4, 'SWEDISH' is a geographical adjective corresponding to the origin country Sweden. It is a non-identity-bearing addition. The identity-bearing main designation 'WHITEWOOD' is present in both documents. Additionally, the invoice header DESCRIPTION field contains the full 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD'.

comparison_steps.description: Check that certificate quantity has both numeric value and unit
comparison_steps.result: Certificate box 7: '97,464 CBM'. Numeric value: 97.464 (using comma as thousands separator or decimal). Unit: CBM (cubic meters). Both present.

comparison_steps.description: Determine which quantity in the certificate is the verification basis from box 7
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains '97,464 CBM'. This is the sole quantity in box 7 and thus the verification-basis quantity.

comparison_steps.description: Search for numeric value 97,464 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice VOLUME column: 97,464. Invoice total volume: 97,464 m³. The numeric value 97,464 (=97.464) is explicitly present in the invoice. CBM and m³ are the same unit (cubic meters). Direct match.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check — numeric value 97.464 identified in invoice volume field
Verification against invoice — numeric value matches exactly

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '97,464 CBM'. The comma in '97,464' represents a decimal separator (European notation for 97.464 cubic meters). Invoice states VOLUME 97,464 m³ and Total volume 97,464 m³. CBM and m³ are equivalent (both mean cubic meters). The numeric value 97.464 is identical in both documents. Result: MATCH per 4.4.1 and 4.4.3.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 97,464 could be interpreted as 97464 (ninety-seven thousand four hundred sixty-four) with comma as thousands separator
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: In context, the invoice uses the same notation '97,464' under a VOLUME (m³) column. A volume of 97,464 m³ is consistent with a shipment of 25 packages of whitewood. A volume of 97,464 m³ (ninety-seven thousand) would be unreasonable for 25 packages. The European decimal notation is clearly intended in both documents.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin designation in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has an explicit ORIGIN field containing 'SWEDEN'. This is a dedicated origin field.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU, SWEDEN'. Check if both can be verified.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate origin: 'EU, SWEDEN'. This is EU + one specific member state. Invoice ORIGIN: 'SWEDEN'. Sweden is an EU member state. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1: when certificate states 'EU [country]' (EU combined with ONE specific EU member state) and the invoice contains 'SWEDEN' as origin — Sweden is an EU member state, confirming EU origin. Per 4.5.4.2 bidirectional rule: cert=EU-land, faktura=specific country that is EU member → verified. Additionally checking if invoice contradicts EU origin: no non-EU origins found in invoice.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.2.1 - EU + one member state special rule
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 'EU, SWEDEN' — EU combined with ONE specific EU member state. Invoice ORIGIN field states 'SWEDEN', which is an EU member state. Invoice confirms the specific country Sweden. Per 4.5.4.2, the certificate's 'EU' component is verified because Sweden is an EU member (cert=EU ↔ faktura=EU-member → verified). The specific member state 'SWEDEN' is explicitly confirmed in the invoice. No contradicting origins in invoice.

rules_applied.description: Invoice contains explicit ORIGIN field with 'SWEDEN'
EU ↔ member state normalization — bidirectional: EU in certificate verified by Sweden (EU member) in invoice
EU + one member state: invoice's 'SWEDEN' confirms both EU origin and the specific country

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin: 'EU, SWEDEN'. Invoice ORIGIN field: 'SWEDEN'. Sweden is an EU member state. Per 4.5.4.2, the EU component is verified because the invoice confirms an EU member state. Per 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate states EU + one specific member state and the invoice explicitly confirms that member state, this is a full match. No non-EU origins present in invoice. No contradictions. Result: MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice says only 'SWEDEN' but certificate says 'EU, SWEDEN' — invoice doesn't explicitly mention 'EU'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.5.4.2, the exchange between 'EU' and a specific EU member state is explicitly bidirectional. Certificate=EU ↔ Invoice=Sweden (EU member) is a verified match. Per 4.5.4.2.1, when certificate combines EU with ONE specific member state and invoice confirms that member state, this is MATCH.

evidence_records.raw_text: Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.
Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.

evidence_records.location: DESCRIPTION field and DESCRIPTION OF GOODS column

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not applicable — no LC reference found in certificate

Certificate file (Document A) contains certificate on page 1 and embedded invoice copy on page 2. Invoice file (Document B) contains the separate invoice. Verification performed against Document B (separate invoice file) per rule 8.5.0.
Passed — consignor and consignee both match between certificate and invoice. Order number SBI 251020 matches.
Direct match — consignor found as SELLER in invoice
Exact match: 'Campanello & Co AB' = 'Campanello & Co AB'
BUYER field identified as primary billing field
Kingdom of Saudi Arabia = Kingdom of Saudi Arabia — MATCH

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Identity-bearing main designation 'WHITEWOOD' found in invoice
'SWEDISH' is geographical prefix matching origin country; '25 PACKAGES' is packaging info — neither affects identity
Numeric value 97.464 found in invoice VOLUME column and total volume
Certificate 'EU' verified by invoice 'SWEDEN' (EU member state)

rule_evaluation_log.description: EU + one member state special rule

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Campanello & Co AB, mottagaren Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est., varubeskrivningen Swedish Whitewood, mängden 97,464 CBM och ursprungslandet EU/Sverige kan alla verifieras mot fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor (Campanello & Co AB, Sweden), consignee (Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est., Kingdom of Saudi Arabia), goods description (Swedish Whitewood / Whitewood), quantity (97.464 CBM/m³), and country of origin (EU, Sweden / Sweden) all match between certificate and invoice. No discrepancies found.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Campanello & Co AB, Kungsporten 4a, SE-427 50, Billdal, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Campanello & Co AB, Kungsporten 4a, SE-427 50 Billdal, Sweden (SELLER field)
sections.rule_applied: Direct name and country match — same legal party identified
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Campanello & Co AB' i Sverige återfinns exakt i fakturans SELLER-fält med samma namn, adress och land.

sections.certificate_value: Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est. 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash Sharafiyah District, Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est. 6276 Khalid LBN Al-Waleed Ash, Sharafiyah District, Jeddah, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (BUYER field)
sections.rule_applied: Direct name and country match — same legal party identified in BUYER field
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Mohammed A Ali Bin Mahfouz Trading Est.' i Saudiarabien återfinns exakt i fakturans BUYER-fält med samma namn, adress och land.

sections.invoice_value: SWEDISH WHITEWOOD (DESCRIPTION header) / WHITEWOOD (DESCRIPTION OF GOODS line item)
sections.rule_applied: Controlled text matching — identity-bearing main designation 'WHITEWOOD' matched; 'SWEDISH' is a geographic prefix matching origin country
sections.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'SWEDISH WHITEWOOD' återfinns i fakturans DESCRIPTION-fält. Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'WHITEWOOD' finns i båda dokumenten. 'SWEDISH' är ett geografiskt prefix som överensstämmer med ursprungslandet Sverige.

sections.rule_applied: Direct occurrence check — numeric value 97.464 identified in invoice volume field; CBM and m³ are equivalent units
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mängd 97,464 CBM återfinns exakt i fakturans volymkolumn (97,464 m³) och i totalraden (Total volume 97,464 m³). CBM och m³ betecknar samma enhet (kubikmeter).

sections.rule_applied: EU member state normalization — EU verified by Sweden (EU member); specific member state Sweden confirmed in invoice ORIGIN field
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprung 'EU, SWEDEN'. Fakturan anger 'SWEDEN' i ett explicit ORIGIN-fält. Sverige är en EU-medlemsstat, vilket verifierar EU-komponenten. Inga icke-EU-ursprungsländer förekommer i fakturan.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints evaluated as MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW found. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH statuses. Confidence floor (0.85) satisfied for all checkpoints.
